localPoprad.metaTitle: Web Development in Poprad – custom websites & apps | Kromka IT
localPoprad.metaDescription: Looking for web development in Poprad? I build custom websites and web applications – modern, fast and reliable, from design to deployment. Dávid Kromka, Poprad, Slovakia.
localPoprad.title: Web Development in Poprad
localPoprad.intro:
I build modern, custom websites and web applications for companies, sole traders and individuals in Poprad and the surrounding region. Whether you need a presentation site, an e-shop, a booking system or a larger web application, I take care of the whole project – from design and development to launch and maintenance.

I am based right in Poprad, so we can meet in person, and I work just as well remotely with clients across Slovakia.
localPoprad.benefit1: A website tailored to your needs, not a generic template
localPoprad.benefit2: Fast, modern, clear pages on mobile and desktop
localPoprad.benefit3: A personal approach and direct communication with a developer in Poprad
localPoprad.benefit4: Complete care – from design to deployment and maintenance
localPoprad.why: I am a full-stack developer with a master's degree from FIIT STU and experience on both domestic and international projects. I build websites on modern technologies such as Next.js, React and ASP.NET Core, with an emphasis on performance, security and accessibility.
localPoprad.ctaTitle: Interested in a website or app?
localPoprad.ctaSubtitle: Tell me a few words about your project and I'll get back to you with a proposed solution.
